title: Constituency Help & Resources | Get Help Today — Anna Gelderd MP
meta_description: Explore constituency resources and support services including housing, health, safety, and more provided by MP Anna Gelderd for South East Cornwall constituents.
text_excerpt: Constituency Help & Resources | Get Help Today — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Help & Advice If you live in South East Cornwall and are facing a problem, whether it’s with housing, healthcare, policing or something else, I may be able to help. Some issues fall within the responsibility of local councils or other services, but I will always do what I can to support you, signpost you to the right place, or raise your concerns where appropriate. Below you’ll find guidance and useful contacts for some of the most common areas people contact me about. Housing What Anna can help with: Delays or problems with housing associations Cases of serious disrepair or unsafe conditions Social housing allocation concerns Where else to turn: Cornwall Council Housing : Click here Shelter England : Click here or 0808 800 4444 Citizens Advice Cornwall : Click here Emergency housing? Contact Cornwall Council on 0300 1234 161 Children What Anna can help with: Supporting parents with concerns over school placements or SEND provision (if unresolved locally) Raising wider education policy concerns in Parliament Where else to turn: Your school’s headteacher or governor board Cornwall Council Education Services SENDIASS Cornwall (independent advice) Childline / NSPCC Health Services What Anna can help with: Raising concerns with NHS Trusts or ministers where there are repeated service failures Highlighting access issues with local providers Where else to turn: Your GP or local practice manager Cornwall & Isles of Scilly ICB (Integrated Care Board) PALS (Patient Advice and Liaison Service) or 01208 834620 NHS Complaints or 0300 311 22 33 Cornwall Council What Anna can help with: If you have exhausted Council channels and still need help, I may be able to raise issues with senior officials or highlight them publicly. What to do first: Report issues (bins, roads, planning) Contact your local Cornwall Councillor For complaints Policing & Crime What Anna can help with: Raising local concerns with Devon & Cornwall Police leadership Highlighting patterns of crime or antisocial behaviour at a strategic level Where else to turn: Report a crime : 101 or Contact us | Police.uk Crimestoppers (anonymous reports) Victim Support Citizens Advice If you're not sure where to turn, Citizens Advice Cornwall is a brilliant first port of call. They can help with: Debt and money issues Benefits, employment, and consumer rights Housing and family problems 📞 Call: Adviceline 0808 812 7156 Monday to Friday 10am to 4pm 🌐 Website: www.citizensadvicecornwall.org.uk 📍 Find your local office: 21 Dean Street, Liskeard PL14 4AB 0800 144 8848 Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP
